name: Technetron Electronics
description_short: Technetron Electronics is a credit repair provider based in New York, New York. Rated 4.0/5 with 45 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Technetron Electronics is a credit repair provider serving clients in New York, New York. Carrying a 4.0/5.0 Google rating from 45 reviews, Technetron Electronics has an strong reputation among consumers in the New York area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a stereo repair service, video equipment repair service, Technetron Electronics provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in New York, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Technetron Electronics operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering Technetron Electronics should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
